---
title: "Smart Typst Tables"
format: typst
filters:
  - quarto
  - ../_extensions/smart-typst-tables/smart-typst-tables.lua
execute:
  echo: false
smart-tables:
  profile: academic
  table-width: natural
  align: center
  stripe: true
---

This example uses one extension configuration for all ordinary tables:

```yaml
smart-tables:
  profile: academic
  table-width: natural
  align: center
  stripe: true
```

`table-width: natural` prevents short tables from filling the whole page. The
table is then centered horizontally with `align: center`.

## Markdown table with caption and cross-reference

::: {#tbl-project-schedule}

| Workstream | Start date | Review date | Duration | Planned hours | Completed hours | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Discovery | 2026-01-06 | 2026-01-20 | 2 weeks | 80 | 76 | Complete |
| Prototype | 2026-01-21 | 2026-02-18 | 4 weeks | 160 | 132 | In progress |
| Pilot | 2026-02-19 | 2026-03-11 | 3 weeks | 120 | 0 | Planned |
| Launch | 2026-03-12 | 2026-03-26 | 2 weeks | 96 | 0 | Planned |

Project schedule summary.
:::

See @tbl-project-schedule.

## Numeric summary

Numeric, percentage, and currency-like columns are inferred and right-aligned.

::: {smart-tables-max-header-lines=2}

| Team | Open tasks | Average cycle time | On-time rate | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| Platform | 42 | 6.4 days | 91.0% | Stable delivery with a few integration delays. |
| Data | 31 | 5.8 days | 88.5% | Batch validation adds some review time. |
| Design | 18 | 4.1 days | 94.2% | Small queue and fast feedback loops. |
| Operations | 27 | 7.3 days | 86.8% | Waiting on external dependencies. |

:::

## Computational table

Tables produced by code benefit when Quarto/Pandoc represents them as tables.

```{r}
#| output: asis
milestones <- read.csv("data/milestones.csv", check.names = FALSE)
knitr::kable(milestones, caption = "Milestones generated by knitr::kable().")
```

## Compact table-level override

::: {smart-tables-profile="compact" smart-tables-stripe="false"}
| Criterion | Weight | What a complete answer should include |
|---|---:|---|
| Scope | 20% | Defines the workstream, owner, and expected deliverable. |
| Evidence | 30% | Uses dates, counts, and rates to support the conclusion. |
| Interpretation | 35% | Explains the operational meaning of the trend or exception. |
| Communication | 15% | Presents the result with clear labels and units. |
:::

## Profiles

The `profile` option changes table density and decoration without changing the
source table.

### Academic

::: {smart-tables-profile="academic"}
| Item | Value | Comment |
|---|---:|---|
| Average score | 84.2% | Standard presentation for a report. |
| Standard deviation | 7.8 | Moderate rules and spacing. |
| Observations | 126 | Default style. |
:::

### Compact

::: {smart-tables-profile="compact"}
| Item | Value | Comment |
|---|---:|---|
| Average score | 84.2% | Useful when space is limited. |
| Standard deviation | 7.8 | Tighter text and margins. |
| Observations | 126 | Suitable for appendices. |
:::

### Exam

::: {smart-tables-profile="exam"}
| Item | Value | Comment |
|---|---:|---|
| Average score | 84.2% | More readable for handouts. |
| Standard deviation | 7.8 | More generous spacing. |
| Observations | 126 | Good for instructional documents. |
:::

### Plain

::: {smart-tables-profile="plain"}
| Item | Value | Comment |
|---|---:|---|
| Average score | 84.2% | Minimal decoration. |
| Standard deviation | 7.8 | Optimized layout only. |
| Observations | 126 | No alternating fill. |
:::

## Option overrides

### Text size

::: {smart-tables-text-size="1.3em"}
| Product area | Monthly cost | Adoption rate | Note |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Documentation | 1 120 $ | 64.0% | Smaller text with text-size. |
| Analytics | 860 $ | 58.5% | Widths remain optimized. |
| Collaboration | 2 430 $ | 72.1% | Numeric columns stay right aligned. |
:::

### Full width for text-heavy tables

::: {smart-tables-width="full" smart-tables-align="center"}
| Step | Owner | Expected output | Follow-up comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| Collect | Analyst | Validated dataset | The comment column receives the remaining space. |
| Model | Lead researcher | Documented assumptions | Text-heavy columns can use flexible tracks. |
| Review | Product team | Decision-ready summary | The table uses the full available width. |
:::

### Alignment

::: {smart-tables-align="left"}
| Table | Alignment | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Short summary | Left | Useful when the table introduces a paragraph. |
| Appendix note | Left | Avoids an overly centered look in dense pages. |
:::

### Stripe and row rules

::: {smart-tables-stripe="true" smart-tables-row-rules="false"}
| Cohort | Participants | Average score |
|---|---:|---:|
| 2024 Q1 | 82 | 91.0 |
| 2024 Q2 | 117 | 88.4 |
| 2024 Q3 | 139 | 92.6 |
:::

### Header repetition

::: {smart-tables-repeat-header="false"}
| Option | Default | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| repeat-header | true | Repeats headers across page breaks. |
| Local override | false | Disables repetition for this table. |
:::

## Opt-out

::: {smart-tables="false"}
| A | B |
|---|---|
| This table | is left unchanged |
:::
